Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/swift-lens/a49c672696c85c1e.db "
SELECT s.name, s.kind
FROM symbols s
LEFT JOIN modules m ON s.moduleId = m.id
WHERE s.projectId = 1
  AND s.kind IN \('struct', 'class', 'enum', 'actor', 'function', 'typeAlias'\)
  AND s.qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'unresolved:%'
  AND s.qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'file:%'
  AND s.qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'module:%'
  AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM edges ce WHERE ce.targetId = s.id AND ce.kind = 'contains'\)
  AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM edges ue WHERE ue.targetId = s.id AND ue.kind NOT IN \('extends', 'contains'\)\)
  AND \(s.attributes IS NULL OR s.attributes NOT LIKE '%@main%'\)
  AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM modules tm WHERE tm.id = s.moduleId AND tm.kind = 'testTarget'\)
  AND \(s.filePath IS NULL OR \(s.filePath NOT LIKE '%/Tests/%' AND s.filePath NOT LIKE '%Tests.swift'\)\)
  AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM edges ce WHERE ce.sourceId = s.id AND ce.kind = 'conformsTo'\)
ORDER BY s.kind, s.name;
")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/swift-lens/a49c672696c85c1e.db "
-- Check if MovieDetailView has incoming composesView edges
SELECT e.kind, s.name FROM edges e JOIN symbols s ON e.sourceId = s.id
WHERE e.targetId = \(SELECT id FROM symbols WHERE name = 'MovieDetailView' AND kind = 'struct' AND qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'unresolved:%' LIMIT 1\)
AND e.kind NOT IN \('extends', 'contains'\);

-- Check why structs like Category, Episode, etc. show as dead
SELECT e.kind, count\(*\) FROM edges e
WHERE e.targetId = \(SELECT id FROM symbols WHERE name = 'Category' AND kind = 'struct' AND qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'unresolved:%' LIMIT 1\)
GROUP BY e.kind;
")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/swift-lens/a49c672696c85c1e.db "
-- Does MovieDetailView have ANY incoming edges?
SELECT e.kind, s.name as fromSymbol FROM edges e JOIN symbols s ON e.sourceId = s.id
WHERE e.targetId IN \(SELECT id FROM symbols WHERE name = 'MovieDetailView' AND kind = 'struct' AND qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'unresolved:%'\);
")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/swift-lens/a49c672696c85c1e.db "SELECT kind, COUNT\(*\) FROM symbols WHERE qualifiedName NOT LIKE 'unresolved:%' GROUP BY kind ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC")
